tasks.summary: EFCore 10 complex types (ToJson) may not be fully documented
tasks.details: Memory note says project uses 'EF Core 10: Complex types with ToJson() (not owned entities)'. Need to verify efcore-integration.md and efcore-json-configuration.md cover the ToJson() pattern correctly and don't reference deprecated owned entity patterns.

tasks.summary: EFCoreWorkCoordinator recently refactored — verify docs match
tasks.details: Memory notes and git history show EFCoreWorkCoordinator had cognitive complexity reduction and recent fixes. work-coordinator-strategies.md covers strategies but may not reflect current EFCoreWorkCoordinator API. Also verify the strategies (Immediate, Scoped, Interval) match current implementation.

tasks.summary: UUIDv7 usage pattern may need documentation
tasks.details: Memory note says 'Guid.CreateVersion7() (never Guid.NewGuid())'. Data pages should mention this pattern where relevant (event IDs, stream IDs, primary keys). This is a project-wide standard that data pages should reinforce.

tasks.summary: Code samples across all 12 pages have auto-generated poor metadata
tasks.details: Same pattern as all previous sessions.
Standard _folder.md gap. Tags should include: data layer, database, PostgreSQL, EF Core, Dapper, schema, persistence.

sectionSummary: The data section has 12 content pages. Main issues: (1) 3 pages missing ALL frontmatter (schema-migration, turnkey-initialization, work-coordinator-strategies), (2) efcore-complex-types page referenced but doesn't exist, (3) 3 more pages missing codeReferences, (4) EFCore 10 ToJson() pattern needs verification, (5) EFCoreWorkCoordinator recently refactored. The section is generally well-structured with good coverage of EFCore, Dapper, Postgres, caching, and schema generation. Code sample metadata issue persists.
